#

when:
  branch: [ ${CI_REPO_DEFAULT_BRANCH}, 'feature/*' ]
  event: [ push, pull_request ]
clone:
  - name: 'Checkout Code'
    image: woodpeckerci/plugin-git
    settings:
      depth: 0

steps:
  - name: 'Run: Test, Publish'
    image: mcr.microsoft.com/dotnet/sdk:10.0.201
    commands:
      - './build.sh Test Publish'
